message:
fix: detect running agents when argv[0] is version number

When Claude Code sets argv[0] to its version (e.g., "2.1.30"), the
pane command does not match "claude" or "node". The code then checked
only descendants, but Claude has no child processes - it IS the process.

Bug: gt crew start --all would kill and recreate running sessions
because IsRuntimeRunning returned false for live Claude sessions.

Fix: Add processMatchesNames() to check the actual process binary name
via ps -p PID -o comm= before checking descendants. This correctly
detects Claude even when argv[0] is the version number.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
